title: Tender Wood-Fired Australian Lamb Bake
description: A delicious and tender lamb bake infused with the flavors of the Australian outback, perfect for a special occasion meal.
instructions: Season the lamb shoulder with salt, black pepper, and mixed Australian herbs.
In a large bowl, whisk together white wine vinegar, Greek yogurt, garlic, and lemon juice.
Place the lamb shoulder in a large baking dish and brush the yogurt mixture evenly over the lamb.
Drizzle olive oil over the lamb and sprinkle with fresh rosemary leaves.
Cover the baking dish with aluminum foil and bake for 2 hours.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 30 minutes, or until the lamb is tender and caramelized.
Meanwhile, prepare the wood chips by soaking them in water for at least 30 minutes.
After the lamb has baked for 2 hours, add the wood chips to the oven and continue baking for an additional 30 minutes, or until the lamb is tender and the wood chips are fragrant.
Remove the lamb from the oven and let it rest for 10 minutes before slicing and serving.
Slice the lamb against the grain and serve with your choice of sides, such as roasted vegetables or a fresh salad.
Garnish with additional fresh rosemary leaves and serve immediately.
